gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/262)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/262)
text: إِنَّ السَّفَهَ خُلُقُ لَئِيمٍ يَسْتَطِيلُ عَلَى مَنْ هُوَ دُونَهُ وَ يَخْضَعُ لِمَنْ [هُوَ] فَوْقَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Khalid, from Shareef Bin Sabiq, from Al Fazl Bin Abu Gurra,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The foolishness is a lowly mannerism. He would extend (himself) upon the one who is below him, and he would succumb to the one who is above him’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from Sharif ibn Sabiq from al-Fadl ibn abu Qurrah from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Dimwittedness is a bad attitude. Such an individual intimidates those below him and is humble (inferior) before those above him.’”
